title: pilosella iserana subsp. anguinescens
intro: Pilosella iserana subsp. anguinescens, a lesser-known species within the Pilosella genus, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pilosella iserana subsp. anguinescens include its potential to alleviate digestive problems, reduce fever, and act as an antiseptic agent. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems can be dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
